agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to be

report.hypothesis: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to better complement SSTR2-specific ECL2/ECL3 contacts, and introducing hydrophobic substitutions at position 11 to avoid off-target SSTR3/SSTR5 interactions, while preserving strong SSTR2 binding.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current designs are achieving strong SSTR2 binding and selectivity, but stru

report.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving strong SSTR2 binding and selectivity, but structural issues are limiting the number of viable candidates. Tightening structural constraints and increasing candidate diversity will improve pass rates.

proposed_changes.rationale: Tightening the clash threshold will improve structural quality by reducing steric clashes, which are likely a major source of structural failures.
Increasing the number of candidates will improve the chances of generating more structurally valid designs while maintaining selectivity.
